## Meeting Purpose

[Explore potential collaboration between Airbyte and fwd.digital for content marketing and SEO optimization.](https://fathom.video/share/NY4yDL3zRs8Cis_vPxA-f7nX7V4kYLHB?tab=summary&timestamp=7.0)

## Key Takeaways

  - [Airbyte is seeing strong enterprise traction but needs to improve mid/bottom-funnel content to convert more high-quality leads](https://fathom.video/share/NY4yDL3zRs8Cis_vPxA-f7nX7V4kYLHB?tab=summary&timestamp=866.0)
  - [fwd.digital has developed an advanced AI-assisted content creation system with human expertise in the loop](https://fathom.video/share/NY4yDL3zRs8Cis_vPxA-f7nX7V4kYLHB?tab=summary&timestamp=333.0)
  - [Both parties are interested in starting a collaboration, potentially beginning with editorial content in February/March](https://fathom.video/share/NY4yDL3zRs8Cis_vPxA-f7nX7V4kYLHB?tab=summary&timestamp=1212.0)

## Topics

### Airbyte's Current Content Situation

  - [\~200-250k monthly page views, with 3,200 existing pages](https://fathom.video/share/NY4yDL3zRs8Cis_vPxA-f7nX7V4kYLHB?tab=summary&timestamp=866.0)
  - [Current setup includes content and SEO agencies based in India, but results have been suboptimal](https://fathom.video/share/NY4yDL3zRs8Cis_vPxA-f7nX7V4kYLHB?tab=summary&timestamp=300.0)
  - [Traffic is increasing, but not translating effectively to pipeline growth](https://fathom.video/share/NY4yDL3zRs8Cis_vPxA-f7nX7V4kYLHB?tab=summary&timestamp=307.0)
  - [Strong traction with enterprises, need more mid/bottom-funnel content to convert high-quality leads](https://fathom.video/share/NY4yDL3zRs8Cis_vPxA-f7nX7V4kYLHB?tab=summary&timestamp=1028.0)

### fwd.digital's Content Creation Approach

  - [Developed an advanced AI-assisted content creation system](https://fathom.video/share/NY4yDL3zRs8Cis_vPxA-f7nX7V4kYLHB?tab=summary&timestamp=421.0)
  - [Uses modular components and workflows represented in code](https://fathom.video/share/NY4yDL3zRs8Cis_vPxA-f7nX7V4kYLHB?tab=summary&timestamp=423.0)
  - [Processes millions of tokens per article for comprehensive research](https://fathom.video/share/NY4yDL3zRs8Cis_vPxA-f7nX7V4kYLHB?tab=summary&timestamp=677.0)
  - [Combines AI capabilities with human expertise for high-quality output](https://fathom.video/share/NY4yDL3zRs8Cis_vPxA-f7nX7V4kYLHB?tab=summary&timestamp=620.0)
  - [Offers both editorial and programmatic content refresh services](https://fathom.video/share/NY4yDL3zRs8Cis_vPxA-f7nX7V4kYLHB?tab=summary&timestamp=1109.0)

### Potential Collaboration Areas

  - [Content refresh: Improving existing 3,200 pages on Airbyte's site](https://fathom.video/share/NY4yDL3zRs8Cis_vPxA-f7nX7V4kYLHB?tab=summary&timestamp=1119.0)
  - [New content creation: Focusing on mid-funnel content to support enterprise sales](https://fathom.video/share/NY4yDL3zRs8Cis_vPxA-f7nX7V4kYLHB?tab=summary&timestamp=1146.0)
  - [SEO optimization: Identifying keyword gaps and opportunities](https://fathom.video/share/NY4yDL3zRs8Cis_vPxA-f7nX7V4kYLHB?tab=summary&timestamp=1348.0)
  - [AI search optimization: Ensuring content is optimized for emerging AI search platforms](https://fathom.video/share/NY4yDL3zRs8Cis_vPxA-f7nX7V4kYLHB?tab=summary&timestamp=1435.0)

## Next Steps

  - [Marcel to add Mario to a shared Slack channel for ongoing communication](https://fathom.video/share/NY4yDL3zRs8Cis_vPxA-f7nX7V4kYLHB?tab=summary&timestamp=1542.0)
  - [Marcel to send a detailed proposal (SOW) with pricing and scope options](https://fathom.video/share/NY4yDL3zRs8Cis_vPxA-f7nX7V4kYLHB?tab=summary&timestamp=1542.0)
  - [Mario to review Airbyte's current content initiatives and agency relationships](https://fathom.video/share/NY4yDL3zRs8Cis_vPxA-f7nX7V4kYLHB?tab=summary&timestamp=1525.0)
  - [Both parties to finalize engagement details and target a February/March start date](https://fathom.video/share/NY4yDL3zRs8Cis_vPxA-f7nX7V4kYLHB?tab=summary&timestamp=1620.0)
